INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GABBRO_POTION.descript: Rocks deal [blue]{GabbroPower}[/blue] additional damage this combat. Add [gold]Primal Force[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-S_NECRO_SOUL_STRIKE_PO: Shadow Necrobinder Soul Strike Potion (PLACEHOLDER NAME)
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-S_NECRO_BLOCK_CURSE_PO:
Gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], plus an additional [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] for each [purple]Curse[/purple] in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
(Gain [blue]{TotalBlock}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold])
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SPACE_DUST_POTION.desc: Choose 1 of 3 random cards to put into your [gold]Cargo[/gold]. Its free until played.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ILLICIT_MUNITION_POTIO: Load {LoadAmmo} [gold]Ammo[/gold]. Your next [gold]Shot[/gold] applies {SiegePower} [gold]Weak[/gold], {SiegePower} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], grants {Block} more [gold]Block[/gold], and deals {FirepowerPower} more damage.
